L

LabeledComponent - Class in app.gui.components
A structural UI wrapper that places a bold descriptive label side-by-side with any input component.
LabeledComponent(String, JComponent) - Constructor for class app.gui.components.LabeledComponent
Constructs a container wrapping a label string paired beside a child component container.
loadDataRecordsFromCsv(String, LocalDateTime, LocalDateTime) - Static method in class app.util.CsvStorageService
Reads and parses a financial dataset CSV file, filtering the records based on an optional bounding start and end date criteria timeframe.
logApiRequest(String, String, String) - Static method in class app.util.LoggerUtil
Standardizes and outputs structured trace records highlighting transactional details from individual outbound remote API requests.
logError(String, String) - Static method in class app.util.LoggerUtil
Formats and logs severe operational faults or unexpected crash scenarios using the SEVERE logging level.
LoggerUtil - Class in app.util
Global logging framework engine utility providing pre-configured standard diagnostic output channels.
LoggerUtil() - Constructor for class app.util.LoggerUtil
 
logInfo(String) - Static method in class app.util.LoggerUtil
Records standard operational messages into the diagnostic streams using the INFO classification level.
